response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack developer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the resume shows no substantive C++ experience beyond a short stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015. The role centers on modern C++/STL, multi-threaded networked systems, message brokers, IEC 62443 secure development, and industrial automation protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA) — none of which appear in the candidate's recent decade of work, which is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. Domain mismatch with industrial automation is significant.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems and asynchronous I/O (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Architectural and mentoring experience including running workshops and courses
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience (2014-2015), no recent modern C++/STL work
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No exposure to industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) or industrial automation domain

key_factors.factor: Missing industrial automation and protocol expertise
Strong general engineering craftsmanship and mentoring
